title: PRMP Benchmark on RelBench rel-hm: PRMPConv vs Standard Aggregation with Ablations
summary: Demo notebook benchmarking Predictive Residual Message Passing (PRMPConv) against standard SAGEConv on synthetic bipartite graphs. Tests 4 variants: standard baseline, PRMP with learned predictions, random-frozen prediction ablation, and no-subtraction (concat) ablation. Generates synthetic graph data, trains all variants, and compares AUROC metrics against reference results from full-scale RelBench rel-hm experiments. Includes training curve visualizations and PRMP diagnostics.
